ip_outcome_note: No suspected_ip flagged. Flavor text explicitly names Pharika; card wires to [[theros-pantheon]].

trivia_bullets.text: Flavor text names Pharika directly: 'Many have sought snake-twined Pharika's panacea. Do you wish to share their fate?' Pharika is the God of Affliction on Theros — black-green aligned, governing disease, poison, and medicine. She is mother of all Theros gorgons and herself thought to take gorgon form; her cures 'frequently carry a painful or costly price.' The Venomous Hierophant, as a Gorgon Cleric, is a direct servant of Pharika. Wires to [[theros-pantheon]].

The 'panacea' in the flavor text is Pharika's legendary cure — a healing draught that can save or destroy depending on dosage. Seekers of this cure become the Hierophant's victims. The card's mill-three ETB mechanic can be read as the 'taste' of Pharika's knowledge: gaining access (graveyard becomes Escape fuel) at a cost.

Venomous Hierophant is a 3/3 Gorgon Cleric for {3}{B} with Deathtouch and a mill-three ETB. Deathtouch is Pharika's canonical domain. The mill feeds THB's Escape mechanic. Hipsters of the Coast rated it C: 'A fine attacker, a reasonable blocker, and a relevant enters-the-battlefield ability all combine to make Venomous Hierophant more than the sum of its parts.'
sources: Hipsters of the Coast: Every Common in Theros Beyond Death Reviewed

trivia_bullets.text: Illustrated by Johannes Voss, recognized in the MTG community for a painterly, intimate rendering style. Voss has illustrated several high-profile MTG cards across multiple sets.
